item.name: Micro-Applications

description.content: Manage built-in CVP micro-applications

item.name: Cisco Voice Portal List Available Micro-applications

request.name: Cisco Voice Portal List Available Micro-applications

description.content: Retrieves a list of built-in CVP micro-applications. Micro-applications are pre-built VXML applications for common IVR tasks such as playing media, collecting digits, and external VXML retrieval. These are invoked through ICM scripting via the Run External Script node.

info.name: Cisco Voice Portal VXML Services API

description.content:
The Cisco Unified Customer Voice Portal (CVP) VXML Services API provides management and monitoring capabilities for the CVP VXML Server component. The VXML Server hosts and executes VoiceXML applications built with Cisco Unified Call Studio. This API enables deployment and management of VXML applications, access to element configurations, and monitoring of the VXML execution environment. The VXML Server exposes its management interface on the HTTP/HTTPS ports (default 7000/7443) alongside the application serving endpoints.

Contact Support:
 Name: Cisco Developer Support
